author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Real Pythia-70M validation: 70.4M params, batch=1, seq=32. Training step 658ms vs PyTorch 155ms (4.2x slower). Loss 11.63→0.99 over 5 steps — correct convergence. Bottlenecks: sequential embedding lookup, unfused attention, data-copying shape ops. The model architecture is structurally correct.
